children.heading: Intent
children.label: a Intent
children.text: To ensure that the United States investment in biomedical research is rapidly translated into improvements in the quality of patient care, there must be a corresponding investment in research on the most effective clinical and organizational strategies for use of these findings in daily practice. The authorization levels in subsections (b) and (c) provide for a proportionate increase in health care research as the United States investment in biomedical research increases.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out this subchapter, there are authorized to be appropriated $250,000,000 for fiscal year 2000, and such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2001 through 2005.

children.heading: Evaluations
children.label: c Evaluations
children.text: In addition to amounts available pursuant to subsection (b) for carrying out this subchapter, there shall be made available for such purpose, from the amounts made available pursuant to (relating to evaluations), an amount equal to 40 percent of the maximum amount authorized in such to be made available for a fiscal year.section 238j of this titlesection 238j of this title

children.heading: Health disparities research
children.label: d Health disparities research
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out the activities under , there are authorized to be appropriated $50,000,000 for fiscal year 2001, and such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2002 through 2005.section 299a–1 of this title

children.heading: Patient safety and quality improvement
children.label: e Patient safety and quality improvement
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out part C, there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2006 through 2010.
